title: Trypo And Lightning
description: get a new dimension, biomes, 2 new tipped arrows, a pretty dope sword, and some other things
body:
# REQUIRES THE 1.20 DATAPACK!!

## This datapack adds:

- a dimension with 4 biomes:
  - purple
  - blue
  - orange
  - pink
- 3 structures and a variant
- 2 new tipped arrows
- a Teleporter Stick
- a key
- a Lightning Sword
- 7 /trigger commands
- pick up and throw ignited TNT

### about the biomes:
- the purple biome has mangrove trees, but purple.
- the blue biome has flowers and diamonds generate on the surface.
- the orange biome is barren and useless...
- the pink biome has cherry trees and cherry flowers.

### about the structures:
- a ruined house that only generates in the trypo dimension
  - the ruined house but with a basement that has loot such as the 2 new tipped arrows
- the Teleporter Altar, you use the teleporter stick on the lodestone in the center of this structure to travel between the overworld and the trypo dimension
- the Lightning Altar, you use the op-sword key on the purple froglight in the center of this structure to get the lightning sword. This structure only generates in the trypo dimension

### about the items:
one of the tipped arrows lets you ride it, and the other explodes when it hits the ground

you can craft the teleporter stick, and the key in a crafting table, check images for the recipes

### the recipes:

Teleporter stick: a stick, eye of ender, and a netherite upgrade

Op-Sword Key: a stick, four end crystals, and a netherite upgrade

### /trigger commands:
there are 2 /trigger commands you can use in survival and 7 in creative including the ones usable in survival:

survival commands:
- bossplayer: adds a boss health bar of the person who ran the command on everyones screen
- DeathLoc: this also runs when you die, it tells you where you last died in the chat

creative commands:
- ridearrowgive: gives a tipped arrow that you ride
- tntarrowgive: gives a tipped arrow that explodes when in grounds
- teleportergive: gives the stick needed to go to the trypo dimension
- opswordkeygive: gives the key needed to get the Lightning Sword
- opswordgive: gives the Lightning Sword

### picking up ignited TNT:
you stand in the tnt and crouch, and you will get the tnt as an item you can throw. you can only pick up one at a time
